Package ecarx.carext.update.ota

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    AutoUpgradeListener
    A listener of automatic upgrade for OTA.
    ConnectivityListener
    A listener of connectivity events.
    DownloadFile
    Represents a file that needs to be downloaded.
    DownloadListener
    A listener of download events.
    DownloadTask
    Represents a download task.
    InstallErrorEcu
    The bean of install error ecu
    InstallErrorRepairListener
    A listener of install error repair.
    InstallListener
    A listener of install events.
    InstallScheduleListener
    A listener of install schedule events.
    IOta
    This class provides the API for accessing ota functionality.
    IOtaDownload
    This class provides the API for managing ota download functionality.
    IOtaInstall
    This class provides the API for managing ota install functionality.
    IOtaInstallErrorRepair
    This class provides the API for installation anomaly repair.
    VersionInfo
    Represents a version.
    VersionListener
    A listener of version events.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    OtaManager
    OTA function entry.
  • Annotation Types Summary 
    Annotation Type Description
    InstallErrorEcu.EcuStatus
    ECU state.
    InstallListener.Status
    Installation status.
    InstallScheduleListener.EventFrom
    Represents where the event comes from.
    IOtaDownload.Reason
    Failed reason.
    IOtaDownload.Status
    Download status.
    IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState
    Reason for inability to install
    IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_READY_FOR_INSTALLATION
    IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_CONNECTIVITY_NOK
    IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_GEARS_NOK
    IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_SPEED_NOK
    IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_SCENE_MODE_NOK: 场景模式不满足； IOtaInstall.IOtaSessionState.UPDATE_FAILED_REASON_DEFAULT: 其他原因不满足；
    IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState
    FOTA power state
    IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_IDLE
    IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_UPGRADE
    IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_IMMEDIATE
    IOtaInstall.OtaUpdateInProgressState.OTA_UPDATE_INPROGRESS_STATE_DEFAULT
    IOtaInstall.RegretState
    Regret state
